full_text:
Chen Yu (Gongwei) 陳瑀 (公瑋)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Yu (陳瑀), styledGongwei (公瑋), was born in Xiapi. Tried to destroy Sun Ce by getting lords in the south to ally against him. Chen Yu was affiliated with Yuan Shu, the Wei Kingdom, and Yuan Shao.
